items.reviewerNotes: Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Blue circular mandatory right-turn arrow visible; q0868 means 'turn right'. Source option D = 'tourner à droite' so map to D.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Exact image/sign match to q0795 (fewer lanes/lane reduction). Local option B is the lane-reduction answer, remapped from master option A. Rejected earlier create/top candidates because their sign meanings differ.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Text-only MCQ about rest after >4 hours; q0445 matches and has correct answer '20 minutes'. Source option D = '20 minutes' so map to D.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Red-bordered triangular sign with Chinese text appears to mean 'reduce speed and yield' / 'ralentir et céder le passage' (source option D). q0816 maps to that meaning — map to D.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Image shows police hand signals; q0896's correctOption indicates 'change lane'. Source option C = 'changer de voie' matches that meaning. Some candidate ambiguity across languages so moderate confidence.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Triangular warning sign with bicycle symbol = 'attention aux véhicules non motorisés' (source D). q0838 correctOptionText 'watch for non-vehicles' matches; map to D.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Text-only highway lane question; q0143 states vehicles >110 km/h should use far left lane. Source option A = 'La première voie à gauche' matches; approve and map to A.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Police hand-signal image matches q0806 exactly; q0806 correct meaning is turn right. Local option A=tourner à droite, so answer key is remapped to A. Rejected staged unresolved/C because C is wait before left turn and does not match the gesture.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Blue rectangular sign with white U-turn arrow = U-turn lane. Master q0770 corresponds to U-turn lane; localized option B ('faire demi-tour') matches that meaning. Rejected top matcher: Top automated match (q0878) indicated straight-going lane which conflicts with the visible U-turn arrow; therefore q0878 was not accepted.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Dashboard icon: car outline with internal arrow indicates air internal circulation. Master q0623 is 'air internal circulation' and localized option B ('la circulation intérieure de l'air') matches.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Green highway service-area sign (P, fuel, fork/knife) = highway service area ahead. Master q0884 corresponds to service area; localized option B matches.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Asks length of probationary period after obtaining license; master q0508 correct = 12 months. Local option B is 12 mois.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image/scene and options concern license-plate violations. Master q0476 correct = 'deliberately cover the license plate'. Localized option C explicitly matches that meaning.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Yellow-black striped marking at tunnel entrance indicates tunnel warning; master q0734 corresponds to tunnel sign. Local option D ('attention au tunnel') matches meaning.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Exact defogger-control image match to q0582. q0582 correct meaning is the defogger switch; local option A=Le système de désembuage. Rejected earlier create/top q0598 because q0598 is a lighting switch symbol, not this defogger control.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image = yellow triangular intersection warning. q0764 meaning = 'intersection'. In this localized option set, 'intersection' is option C, so map master meaning to source letter C.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Blue information sign with 'P', bench and nature symbols — suggests a rest area. q0892 maps to 'rest area' (master key A). In localized options, 'aire de repos' is C, so map to C. Some ambiguity with observation deck/service area increases risk.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image shows a U-turn arrow struck through (prohibition). q0669 correct meaning = 'no U-turn'. Localized option B = 'défense de faire demi-tour' matches.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Source image is the blue straight+right mandatory sign, exact match to q0768. Local option B=aller tout droit et tourner à droite maps to q0768 correct option B. Replaced q0746 because q0746 is a traffic-light intersection image, not this sign.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Icon is a key in a rectangle — semantically matches a door lock/unlock control. Top candidate q0624 covers the same switch function; source option D corresponds to 'door unlock'. Close runner-up (child safety lock) creates some ambiguity.

Codex high-risk approveExistingQid: Source asks penalty points for driving after drinking/intoxication; q0487 is the matching 12-point penalty item. Local option D=12 points. High-risk only because French wording 'état d'ivresse' is broader than the English gloss but prior KO/JA/RU q0487 translations support the same concept.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Exact pavement guide-arrow image match to q0776. q0776 correct meaning is left turn ahead; local option D=tourner à gauche. Replaced q0763 because q0763 is a traffic-light intersection image, not a guide arrow.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Prompt and correct response (slow down, keep distance and be ready to stop) align with q0141; source option A expresses the same precaution.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Exact road image/options match q0438 (max speed on this highway). Local option D=70 km/h. Rejected unrelated road/speed candidates because q0438 asset and option row align.
